name: intro
label: Intro paragraph
default: Institutional CRE, insurance markets, cleantech, and energy — the experience that turns strategy into outcomes.

default.bio: Founder of a major Canadian commercial real estate architecture firm. Experienced CRE investor with multiple successful exits and deep institutional portfolio insight.
Partner at Evok Innovations. Bay Area executive and cleantech investor with multiple successful exits. Guides deep-tech ventures from early stage through scale.
Senior leader at AXA XL driving innovation across Lloyd's Property business. Provides insurance-sector, underwriting, and emerging-technology perspective.
Co-founder of One Exchange, a leading North American energy and carbon trading platform. Supports Novem Digital's ESG and environmental market strategy.
